text:
Bills, Payments and Refunds
Welcome to the Office of the Bursar!
We are here to provide you or your parents with your tuition and fees, payment information, refunds and alternative payment options at NYU Shanghai. The information below will assist you in making timely payment of your tuition and fees. We encourage you to manage your account online through your eSuite account. We understand the importance of effective and efficient communication between the university and students, and we strive to provide excellent customer service to our students.
Chinese Students
US Students
International Students
Study Away and Visiting Students
Financial Responsibilities
FAQ and Contact Us
Billing and Payment Due Dates
Students will be sent electronic bills (e-Bills) each semester of enrollment. The Office of the Bursar sends notifications approximately 2-3 weeks prior to the semester due date. Fall e-Bills are generally available in mid-July and spring e-Bills are generally available in early December. Students will be required to submit payment prior to a semester start date. Fall payment is generally due in early August, and spring payment is generally due in early January. Billing and payment due dates are listed below.
Academic Year 2025-2026
*The Class of 2029 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2025.
**The Class of 2029 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
Academic Year 2024-2025
*The Class of 2028 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2024.
**The Class of 2028 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2027 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2023.
**The Class of 2027 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2026 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of August 2022.
**The Class of 2026 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2025 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of August 2021.
**The Class of 2025 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2024 International students' bill date is scheduled for early August. The Class of 2024 Chinese national students’ bill date will be depend on final admission date, scheduled for the end of August 2020.
**The Class of 2024 International students' bill due date will be Aug 14th, 2020. The Class of 2024 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2023 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2019.
**The Class of 2023 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.

text_blocks.text: Welcome to the Office of the Bursar!

We are here to provide you or your parents with your tuition and fees, payment information, refunds and alternative payment options at NYU Shanghai. The information below will assist you in making timely payment of your tuition and fees. We encourage you to manage your account online through your eSuite account. We understand the importance of effective and efficient communication between the university and students, and we strive to provide excellent customer service to our students.

Students will be sent electronic bills (e-Bills) each semester of enrollment. The Office of the Bursar sends notifications approximately 2-3 weeks prior to the semester due date. Fall e-Bills are generally available in mid-July and spring e-Bills are generally available in early December. Students will be required to submit payment prior to a semester start date. Fall payment is generally due in early August, and spring payment is generally due in early January. Billing and payment due dates are listed below.
*The Class of 2029 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2025.
**The Class of 2029 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
*The Class of 2028 Chinese national students’ bill date will depend on final admission date, schedule for the end of July 2024.

*The Class of 2024 International students' bill date is scheduled for early August. The Class of 2024 Chinese national students’ bill date will be depend on final admission date, scheduled for the end of August 2020.
**The Class of 2024 International students' bill due date will be Aug 14th, 2020. The Class of 2024 Chinese national students’ bill due date will be three weeks from bill date.
